summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mira AI enhancements. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: context-aware quick prompts on travel/care pages, voice input button, new chat button, history button, and full Ask Mira page with pet sidebar.

minor.issue: Research mode queries with LLM web research take >60 seconds, causing timeouts. The feature works but response time is slow.

critical_code_review_comments: get_pillar_quick_prompts() correctly returns pillar-specific prompts for all 12 pillars
needs_research() correctly detects factual queries with keywords like 'permit', 'rules', 'regulations'
perform_web_research() is called for research mode queries (verified in logs)
New session endpoint /api/mira/session/new creates unique session IDs with 'mira-' prefix
History endpoint /api/mira/history returns sign-in prompt for unauthenticated users
Chat response includes quick_prompts array for frontend to display
Voice input uses Web Speech API (browser-dependent, works in Chrome)
MiraAI.jsx correctly fetches pillar-specific prompts when pillar changes
MiraPage.jsx shows pet sidebar with Pet Soul data for logged-in users
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mira AI enhancements fully functional. Quick prompts endpoint returns pillar-specific prompts. Research mode activates for factual queries but LLM response is slow (>60s). Voice input uses Web Speech API. New session and history endpoints work correctly.

research_mode.needs_research_function: PASS - detects keywords like permit, rules, regulations
research_mode.research_mode_flag_in_response: PASS - research_mode: true for factual queries
research_mode.non_research_queries: PASS - research_mode: false for simple queries

voice_input_frontend.microphone_button_visible: PASS - visible in both widget and full page

context_aware_quick_prompts_frontend.travel_page_shows_travel_prompts: PASS - Book a Cab, Flight Help, Travel Documents
context_aware_quick_prompts_frontend.care_page_shows_care_prompts: PASS - Book Grooming, Vet Visit, Pet Sitting

ask_mira_full_page.quick_actions: PASS - Travel, Stay, Care, Dine, Celebrate, Advice

api_tests_results.quick_prompts_fallback: PASS - Unknown pillar returns advisory prompts
api_tests_results.new_session_authenticated: PASS - Creates session with user info
